content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from slovenian to english:
Čeprav so bile proge za vagone sestavljene zgolj iz vzporednih desk, so zaradi njih konji, ki so jih vlekli, lahko dosegli večje hitrosti in vlekli večja bremena kot na takratnih nekoliko slabših cestah.
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

As a linguistic expert, I have analyzed the structure and context of your Slovenian sentence. It describes the historical development of early wagonways (the precursors to railways).

Here is the translation:

### Although the wagon tracks were composed merely of parallel planks, they allowed the horses that pulled them to reach higher speeds and haul heavier loads than on the somewhat inferior roads of that time. ###
